content.en:
Not long after, the news that Ye Tian had broken through the ninth floor of the Taichu Tower came out.

However, many Nine Realm-level controllers were not too surprised, after all, Ye Tian had shown incomparably strong strength when he snatched the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid in the Primal Spirit Mountain before.

Therefore, he is now going to break through the Primal Tower, and break through the ninth floor, there is nothing to be shocked.

However, after many Nine Realm-level controllers bumped into Ye Tian in Taichu Mountain, they vaguely felt that Ye Tian's aura had become very powerful, even without the help of the Ten Thousand Phases Statue and the Will Blade, they definitely had the strength of the sixth layer of the Taichu Tower.

Boundary River No. 89.

The Snow Maiden controller also had a general understanding of the strength of his junior brother at this time.

"Ye Tian has made rapid progress, I'm afraid that he is almost invincible among the Nine Realm-level controllers, which is almost equivalent to my previous realm at the Nine Realms-level controllers!"

The Snow Maiden controller was a little surprised.

She couldn't imagine why Ye Tian's growth rate was so fast, it simply broke her cognition!

At this rate, maybe it won't be too long before Ye Tian can be promoted to the extreme of the Nine Realm-level controllers, and he has the qualifications to open up the Realm River and impact the Ten Realm-level controllers.

......

this day.

When Ye Tian was practicing, an Eternal Controller contacted Ye Tian.

"Qing Se is in control, it's her!"

Ye Tian was familiar with this nature, after all, he had copied her body.

Now, the Qing Se controller has also stepped into the realm of the Nine Realms level controller, but his strength is not as good as him, after all, the Qing Se controller does not have the opportunity of Ye Tian, so it is only comparable to the strength of the fourth layer of the Taichu Tower.

The purpose of the Qing Se controller contacting Ye Tian is very simple, that is, she has a statue of ten thousand phases and is ready to trade, but it depends on whether Ye Tian can get a treasure that is enough to make her heart move.

Ye Tian immediately contacted the Qing Se controller, and the two sides agreed to meet in a place called Fengxue City in the Origin Boundary Sea.

Soon.

Ye Tian and Qing Se controlled the time and space and came to Fengxue City.

Fengxue City is also very famous in the Origin Realm Sea, mainly because there is a vision of flying snow reflecting time and space in the sky, so Fengxue Masters built Fengxue City here, and many strong people like to stay in this city.

Soon, the two met.

"Infinite Master, I have two statues of ten thousand phases in my hands that can be traded for you, but if there is no treasure suitable for me, I will not trade them. Qing Se said.

In fact, she also wanted to collect the nine Ten Thousand Phases Statues, but it was too difficult, and she thought about it for a long time before finally deciding to take them out.

"Two statues of all phases!"

Ye Tian was very excited in his heart, if the transaction was in hand, then he would have completely gathered the nine Ten Thousand Phase Statues, and his strength would inevitably increase again.

The nine Ten Thousand Phase Statues are all together, and even the Ten Realm-level controllers will be of some help!

However, his appearance did not show it.

"What do you want?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It depends on what you can come up with. Qing Se said.

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, and then made a decision in his heart.

"Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid!" Ye Tian said.

"Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid?" the Qing Se controller was surprised, "Are you willing to take out this good thing?" However, if it is only one or two drops, it will not be of much use to me, and I will not take it out and trade it." "

"How many drops of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid do you need, I have a way to get it for you!"

Ye Tian said.

"Do you really want me to quote myself?" said the Celebrity.

"Yes! If the price is right, I will trade, if it is not suitable, then forget it!" Ye Tian said.

The Qingser controller pondered for a moment, and finally quoted a price: "Three hundred drops!"

"Three hundred drops of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, this price is too high, isn't it?"

Ye Tian frowned.

Qing Se Controller said: "This is not high, you are not the only Eternal Controller of the Origin Realm Sea to purchase the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, if you are not willing to trade, I can also find other Eternal Controllers to trade." For example, some Ten Realm-level controllers also need Ten Thousand Phase Statues, and if they pay some price, it is not impossible to get a treasure comparable to three hundred drops of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid. "

"It's still too high, and the Ten Realm-level controllers may not be able to get the treasures you need, such as the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, many Ten Realm-level controllers don't have many drops, they definitely can't take out three hundred drops, if they replace them with other treasures, it may not be suitable for you." Ye Tian said.

Immediately, the two bargained.

In the end, two Ten Thousand Phase Statues were traded for the price of two hundred drops of the Primal Spirit Fist Liquid.

Both were overjoyed with the deal.

......

"The Infinite Controller is willing to trade two hundred drops of Primal Spirit Spring Liquid for twenty thousand phase statues, it seems that he is about to gather nine Ten Thousand Star Statues, otherwise he will definitely not be willing to pay such a price. Moreover, where did he get so much Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid? At the beginning, he only snatched a few drops of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid in Primal Spiritual Mountain!"

The Qing Se Controller wondered.

"Could it be that he borrowed it from a few senior brothers of the Infinite Master, or was it given to him by his master?"

The Qing Se controller thought for a long time, but he didn't understand it, but he didn't think about it either.

In short, she made a lot of money this time.

The other side.

Ye Tian went back with two statues of ten thousand phases, and then put together nine statues of ten thousand phases.

Rumble!!!!

The nine statues of Ten Thousand Phases began to gradually merge together under the traction of inexplicable forces.

In a short time, the nine Wanxiang statues turned into an incomparably huge Wanxiang statue, surrounded by a Wanxiang Lin Dragon Phantom.

Suddenly, a secret technique of inheritance flew out from this huge statue of Ten Thousand Phases, turning into a ray of light and pouring into Ye Tian's soul.

"Empty eyes!"

This is the ability of this secret art of inheritance.

One of the ten great inheritance secret techniques of the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon, this is an incomparably powerful ability, which can directly freeze hundreds of millions of time and space, and even the top origin controllers are far from being able to compare.

This kind of inheritance secret technique has a limited number of inheritances, but in the Origin Realm Sea, there are too few eternal controllers who have gathered the nine Ten Thousand Phases Statues, so Ye Tian can continue to inherit this secret technique.

Bang!!!!

The inheritance secret technique was constantly accepted by Ye Tian, and after a long time, it finally turned into one of his own inheritance secret techniques.

"With Void Eyes, my strength has skyrocketed!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Moreover, he can also urge this Wanxiang Lin Dragon Statue composed of nine Wanxiang statues, and his strength will be much stronger again.

Now, even if Ye Tian's strength is not as good as that of the Ten Realm-level controllers, it will not be much weaker.

This is the power of the Wanxiang Lin Dragon Statue plus the Void Eyes!
